Gente, eu vou pagar R$ 1000 para esse cara de novo. Eu não aguento essa vida. Eu não aguento. Que delícia. Que [grito] gostoso. Eu vejoso aqui, ó. Invejoso. Dois toques até minha irmã faz. Ô novo Nei, se você fizer com um toque, eu pago R$ 1.000 pr você. Novo Neymar para calar a boca do Aladin. Partiu que Kid de Neymarzinho. Toma ladson. Toma que o menino é craque. O menino é craque. videos.transcript: Pesquisar transcrição I turned my house into a school the crew turned every room in my house into classrooms and I invited four friends to spend the whole day at this school and throughout the video we'll have to face challenges in each class each challenge is worth a star but silly mistakes and bad behavior can make you lose your stars and if they reach zero you're kicked out of the school in the end the student with the most stars wins and becomes the star student we are now in front of the school bus stop and theoretically the bus taking us to school will arrive any moment but and all Dino weren't we supposed to be in uniform to go to school that's true and that could make us lose points right away you're right now everyone is perfectly in uniform just in time in Aldino I thought it would just be us at school man whoa is star trying to get a private lesson yeah we're going to class just like you right sorry guys I just didn't expect it anyway let's sit down let's sit down I'll sit here so no one sits next to me hey excuse me dude all good nice to meet you Vinnie can I sit here sure thanks man do you like soccer oh I prefer playing I don't really like watching oh dude you're one of mine give me 5 I also love playing a lot man oh where should I sit sit here hi how are you I'm Jessica but you can call me Jesse my name is Yasmin nice to meet you nice to meet you hey dude can I sit here can't you see huh all right I'll just find another seat thanks wow that guy was really rude dude I really don't get where these other students came from either hey guys everyone buckle up we're leaving all right all right class we're here wow my house really did turn into a school whoa dude I can hardly recognize this place oh I'm so lazy hello I'm Principal Larissa and welcome to hello school hi larissa shh quiet for you principal weird before you enter I'll explain some rules about how this school works each of you starts with 2 stars on the behavior board and you can earn more stars based on your behavior and grades but you can lose them too you can head to the courtyard oh man I'm scared wow man when Inaldino said we were going to film this video I didn't think everyone would take it so seriously yeah I just don't want to fail like I did in high school aw it was her it really wasn't me yeah it wasn't us oh who could it have been I can't believe I'm going through this just like in my school days relax Jesse these boys are always like this just ignore them yeah guys while class hasn't started I'm gonna show you my new backpack look how cool it is I even put some new things we're launching for back to school this year inside this little kit comes with stuff like a mechanical pencil eraser even a wallet so I can study in class obviously I've also got several notebooks from the channel for taking notes and some other channel materials that will be super important for classes students to the classroom now now classes were about to start and the first was math math math I'm terrible at it dude and it looks like this is the classroom wow it's been a while I think we got here a bit late man well isn't that nice first day of class and you're arriving at this time sorry teacher since it's the first day we took a bit to find the bathroom to your seats now are you delaying my class sorry teacher alright my students my name is Romeo and I'm your math teacher I want to see if you're good with numbers the first student to get 3 answers right will earn a star first question five times seven is equal to me me Jessica 78 78 that's wrong does anyone know the answer I think it's 28 no way for heaven's sake does anyone here know the right answer I know teacher 35 very good Bill congratulations see what's up guys too easy very well my students next problem 40 / 4 this one's easy I know is it 22 the worst part is I don't even have hair left to pull out wrong answer my boy teacher this one is easy it's 10 look correct answer congrats see wow guys I haven't gotten a single answer right yet and if I want to earn the star for this class I need to get 3 answers right but I'm terrible at math hey pessimist PSS hey why are you throwing this at me shh keep it down give me the answer to the next one not me I don't even know you hey hey hey let's stop with the side conversations OK and aldino if I catch you disrupting my class again you'll lose a star sorry teacher it won't happen again students next problem 12 * 2 I know 32 32 that's wrong does anyone else know I know 24 correct answer ha ha Bill with one more correct answer you learn a star oh I can't let him win very well my students what's 300 + 250 me I know I know $110 that's the right answer you see oh she wants to win huh let's see then what's 8 times 9 Bill raised his hand first go ahead and answer okay that's super easy teacher 72 congrats Bill that's the right answer you've earned a star you know thanks teacher you're the best wait there's something off with his finger nothing's wrong really you lost I won yeah right teacher I think Bill is cheating what what do you mean cheating in my class let me see that finger of yours I'm not cheating teacher I'm not cheating honest how nice huh you're the one who's looking nice today right brushed your hair looking great straight to the principal's office now oh come on teacher thanks Emily I can't believe I got caught cheating that's not good Habib look principal I can explain it's because of Emily I wanted to compete with her in math well Mr Gabriel now you're way behind because getting caught cheating will cost you a star no principal please not a star too late Emily since you scored the most points after Bill you get the star where you go yes I'm going to be the best student in the class this year very well Emily here's your star see you next class students after math class the next class was biology hey class my name is David for those who don't know me for those who know me I'm still David and I'm your biology teacher oh how cool I love biology what are you teaching today teacher today's class is this you have to put your hand in this box and by touch guess what animal is inside like this snake here how cool but I think I'm feeling a bit sick guys bye bye but how come anyone else afraid of animals and wants to leave not participate in class yeah teacher I'm a bit scared of snakes too I don't think I can do it teacher well the activity here is going to be very simple then we'll put some animals here if you get it wrong you're out and whoever guesses right stays in the game till the end whoever stays till the end guessing the most animals will win the star they need so let's go let's start the challenge and of course you all get blindfolds and only the one coming here can stand up wow guys I'm good at biology this is my chance to get a star dude we record animal videos all the time it's going to be easy now that you're all blindfolded Beatrice you can stand up oh I hope I get it right now you'll put your hand here to protect the animal's integrity go carefully nice and slow and you need to guess what animal it is oh okay I'm nervous but here I go okay is it a frog unfortunately you got it wrong and you're out of the challenge let's see the next student let me see hmm Vinnie it's your turn Emmy okay put your hand in and tell me which animal is inside the box okay let's go oh very easy teacher is it this is a lizard specifically a gecko wow man you're doing great you're still in the challenge you're approved you can put your blindfold back on and return to your place thanks oh I'm so confident I'm going to win a star today well now that Vinnie got it right let me see who's next Yasmin come here oh I'm scared but it'll be fine please ouch is it furry yep it's furry which animal is inside the box I think it's a cat you're also out of the challenge you got it wrong hey Bill let's go it's your turn wow Yasmin said it's furry what could it be come on Bill what animal is this what what's this it it moves really fast doesn't it yes yes it moves very fast and Yasmin already gave you a clue it's definitely a platypus a platypus Gabriel what Bill you're out too cause it's not a platypus and Al Dino your turn oh everyone knows I'm really good with animals you can start let me see I'm looking oh wait furry I feel something oh my gosh it's furry calm down calm down oh man come on how did people not guess this animal before to me it's obvious it's a rat the rat totally congratulations Inaldo you're still in the game you're going to continue and keep fighting for your star you can go back to your place the star will be mine that's it go on go on well now we have another animal because in Al Dino got the last one right Arthur let's go it's your turn now oh man I'm feeling lazy but let's go it's going to be easy let's see oh just from this chin I can already tell yes very easy it's a turtle you're out like the others it's not a turtle turtles are aquatic creatures and you didn't put your hand in water another one out Emily it's your turn oh I'm going to get another star put your hand in the box and tell me what animal is there oh this one's easy which animal Emily is inside the box there's a tortoise here that's indeed a tortoise not a turtle congrats you got it right I already switched out the animal and for the students still in we need comet your turn hand in the box and tell me what creature this is but this one is lively yep as it gets to the end jumped a lot jumped no from the texture and the jumping guys it cannot be a frog congrats you're still in the game wow what a mess come over here Emily tell me what animal is in the box oh I know what it is go ahead it's a hedgehog wow Emily you gotta join our friends outside cause it's not a hedgehog since Emily didn't get it and Aldino it's your turn come on and Aldino focus I can't mess this up I've already made other videos with d oh my gosh with David so I thought I might know what animals they'd be but wow it's really a lizard with with spikes so based on what I know I think it must be a bearded dragon that's right enaldo you're almost there dude congratulations you can go back to your seat because you guessed another animal right nice since enaldino got it right Vinnie now it's your turn dude it's just you two left come on Vinnie Focus put your hand in the box and tell me what this new animal is wow it's furry and not that small either so what do you think Vinnie by the size here easy easy ah this is a rabbit well Vinnie dude I knew it I knew it this way this way Vinnie what do you mean I got it wrong you got it wrong Vinnie wasn't it a rabbit it wasn't a rabbit Vinnie Vinnie see you next time okay Vinnie Naldino come here guess the animal and earn your star wow Naldino just don't mess up it's my chance wow it's really furry from what I feel it's not a rabbit like Vinnie said I think it might be a Guinea pig that's it Naldino you just got your star because you guessed right it's a Guinea pig whoa guys I can't believe it man I'm tied with Emily with 3 stars maybe I can dream big now I think that's the recess bell oh I can't believe I missed that biology class I should have won to get another star and be the best student in the class relax there will be more classes after recess you're the best I can't wait for gym class man I want to play ball and I just want to go home I thought it was snack time students you have a 30 minute break and can get food in the cafeteria food dude food come on hurry up hey Auntie what's today's snack the usual great hey Vinny you know what I forgot to bring a jacket man it's getting dark and starting to get cold didn't you bring a spare jacket no man I didn't bring a jacket but if you want you can borrow my arm warmer oh no I'd be warm on just one side man never mind oh buddy I'm so mad at that redhead yeah in math class I saw ah but it doesn't matter I'm the smartest I have 3 stars the problem now is that that boy with a visor that snack finished too quickly I'm still hungry but I think I have an idea hey Bill hmm I heard the lunch lady is giving out cake cake cake are you talking about cake seriously is it cake jerk where's the cake where's the cake please I need cake there's no cake here kid what Arthur lied to me you said there was cake there wasn't any cake did you eat my lunch I did carrot head it was really good oh really you'll see you'll see this guy thinks he's going to take my lunch huh he won't mess with me again I have a little surprise for him this here for those who don't know is a shock device I put it in my hand and when I shake his hand he'll get what he deserves ah you guys should have seen it I went up to that redhead took all his lunch he might be tall but he's the biggest goofball around oh but you have to be careful you can't just keep taking people's lunch like that yeah you might get into trouble no relax nobody does anything to me nothing happens I'm the king of this school hey man what's up look I know you ate my lunch right anyway but can you believe you even help me with my diet no hard feelings friends guys I told you goofball he even came over here to thank me we're cool redhead are you crazy look I know you're going crazy you're eating my food and who do you think you are dude I ate it so what what are you gonna do I'll eat your lunch tomorrow you'll see with me oh I think this is going to be trouble principal what's going on here both of you to my office and the rest of the class back to your room fighting at school is unacceptable can either of you explain what happened principal he stole my lunch he shocked me here there's no comparison I see that both of you are wrong zero stars for you both you're expelled from the school expelled but that's too harsh but that's not all you're taking home this book about happy and angry this book talks about the fight against bullying and has lots of educational activities maybe this way you'll learn to treat your classmates right oh I can't believe this it's your fault after all that mess it's time for gym class well students I'm also your gym teacher and I really hope you guys are ready oh teacher if there's one thing I am it's prepared oh teacher can I sit this one out I don't want my shirt to get all sweaty if you sit out you'll get marked absent and lose a star oh fine and teacher can you tell us what today's class will be like the challenge is pretty simple we are going to have an aiming challenge right here and whoever hits the crossbar the most wins the challenge and how many tries do we get teacher you only get three tries I can already tell I'm not gonna get anything right so who wants to start I'll go first the first one's done oh this is super easy for me yeah nothing unusual right very good you hit all the balls next up I'll go oh this is really hard last try here we go oh no didn't get any my turn I'm feeling confident come on Jesse lots of strength whoa wow the goal was over there right second try focus wow I missed by a mile that's it I'm just not good at soccer that's it folks now it's my turn I don't know if I'll be able to score all three goals like Vinnie did but I hope I at least get one in with style right let's go whoa at least one hit that one was really smooth right one more try and Whoo two shots two hits last shot okay ah I almost tied with Vinnie oh it's my turn and I'm not that great at soccer oh it hurts I wasn't expecting that come here I think it's better if you go home that's enough for today can you walk yeah I can let's go it's better to head home whoa Vinnie do you think she'll be okay dude her ankle twist looked really bad yeah man I hope she gets better soon she'll be okay alright I already talked to her everything's fine ready to keep going shall we carry on with the class let's go who's next who's next do you think I'll hit any let's go first shot second one now I'll hit it last chance I gotta hit at least one yeah not this time next up oh I'm not good at soccer but I need to win this star oh I missed the first one oh it's getting better here we go oh not this time with the end of this challenge I think the big winner is Vinnie well any surprise folks no right since you were the best in this class here you go let's put your star up now I'm tied with Emily and enaldino in the race to be the best student in school classes were almost over but now it's time for chemistry hi everyone I'm Sylvia your chemistry teacher in my class I have some important rules you need to have a lab coat and goggles anyone without goggles loses a star okay good thing I've already got my goggles on safety first this is my chance to earn a star of course I brought my goggles for this experiment I'll need you to pair up Jesse want to be my partner sure we need to do well OK so focus hey Vin let's ace this alright leave it to us buddy now that you're in pairs let's do the elephant toothpaste experiment and the pair that does the best experiment wins a star which pair wants to start we'll start teacher I've already taught you everything you need for this experiment it's all on the table you have 30 minutes to do this experiment good luck hey do you know how to do this experiment nope I actually don't that was the only class I didn't pay attention to relax relax we can try our luck maybe it'll work out let's start by mixing this with something oh I think baking soda might be good right okay let's see if mixing this works wow I think it worked teacher look kids unfortunately the experiment isn't right you can stand up and let the next pair come let's show them how it's done do you remember how to make this elephant toothpaste because I don't really remember uh no okay let's see what the teacher left us because she said everything we need is here I don't know what this is but we can add it to our mix oh this detergent here might be useful go ahead dude pour the detergent go go okay let's go detergent okay now I'll pour this thing I have no idea about but let's hope the experiment works oh will something happen I think we're missing another ingredient Ronaldo okay let me grab this green thing let's just put a little bit of this in wait not that what happened Vinnie you're asking me what happened it exploded I know it exploded but where did we go wrong you messed up everything get out of here and forget about the star oh man I'm so mad next pair let's get our star this is gonna be super easy let's start by adding some hydrogen peroxide we need to put the exact amount so nothing goes wrong now let's add the detergent let's also add the exact amount before finishing I'm going to add some colour to our experiment now let's use the last ingredient so we better get ready so let's stand up to make sure everything goes right now let's hope it works this is the grand finale I think it's going to work it's rising look at that how crazy it's working it's working it's like a volcano erupting it could have been better but you guys of course were the closest you deserve a gold star Jesse and Yasmin the best experience in chemistry class after this chemistry class a lot of people ended up tied with 3 stars and the way to decide who would be the best student of the year would be the final test alright kids I'm going to give you the final test whoever gets the highest score will earn a star this test will show who the best student in class is what subject is the final test going to be on everyone will randomly choose their test subject with this spinner I'll go first I hope I get a subject I know well looks like it's going to be a biology test now it's my turn I'll have to take an English test I need to score well no matter the subject oh math my favorite subject my turn I just hope I get a subject that's not too tough oh man biology I don't like it my turn to see what test I'll take and I really need a good score guys hi oh no math I'm not very good at this subject as long as it's not math I'm good philosophy is fine with everyone's test chosen I just want to say good luck guys you have 1 hour to complete this test starting now wow dude math tests aren't my strong suit but I'll focus hey guys check out my pencil case inside I've got some cool and important stuff for the test like this pen with a collectible keychain and this click pen which can come in various random designs let me see which pen I'm going to get cool a pen with the channel's custom logo now let's check out this other pen that can come with all these collectible keychain designs if you want more school videos I can make a video completing this keychain collection too if you'd like wow the zap card alright now I'm really ready to start my test what's the result of this addition it's 4 + 4 oh that's 8 looks like this test is going to be a piece of cake I've got this eraser pen set and it seems there are three different colors let me give it a try now let's see if it erases wow dude it really works guys I got this kit here it comes with an eraser a ruler and this pen with a cool collectible keychain and last I got this never ending pencil which I'm already using for my test this test is hard but I think I can do it oh I'll finish quickly this test is really easy everyone was really focused during the test but after a good while everyone finished time's up I'll collect the tests and bring them back to you I'll be back with the results alright students I'm back with the results and this test will decide who the best student is Yasmin your score an F you'd better start studying for the next ones Eduardo you got a C you didn't even write your own name Jesse you got a C too what I can't believe it Vinicius you got a B yes I got a good score Emily congrats you got an A I knew my score would be the highest actually Emily yours wasn't the highest score Ronaldo A+ A plus I've never gotten such a high score in my life the tie breaking star goes to you I can't believe it I never ever thought I'd be the best student in class even if the school was at my house but it doesn't matter here's your crown for being the best student if you want more school videos like this give a thumbs up and subscribe to the channel

que eu já sei vocês vão achar que talvez tinha emocionado pouco mais que eu falei para você eu precisava de algo impactante e foi isso que eu fiz eu comprei meus amigos simplesmente carro olha só rapaziada meu Deus carro top demais mano top demais não é zero tá eu acabei não comprando um carro zero mas o carro tá com 20 e Poucos Oi tá bem novo mesmo não sendo um carro zero eu acho que eu vou surpreender muita Aninha e ela conseguiu vai ficar muito feliz com esse presente seguinte próximo presente conhecimento pode confiar em mim te bloquear vamos lá Ninha aí eu acho que você pode dar mais dois espaços ai ai que é isso zoando Olha onde você dá o passo eu pensei por um momento tem um degrauzinho Calma calma quando você tirar a venda seu presente na sua frente a o seu presente Nossa brincando a chave está aqui para você é um carro você não tá me dando um carro Meu bem beijinho amor veio é um carro que louco já cansei desse vídeo aqui não sei o que mais um presidente pode preciso surpreender tá aí vai eu queria ter porque eu acho ele muito bonito eu gosto muito dele mesmo [Música] então ó ó colocou no pi é ponto é o ponto separa pisa no freio bota na rede que o seu presente no primeiro dia com ele né eu te dei vários presentes ao longo do dia depois de a todos para você até joia odeia também eu buguei agora todos os presentes até o número 23 porque o presente 24 eu ainda vou te dar todos os países que ainda faltam para eu te dar nesse vídeo eu respondi todos eles pela casa e eles são também os presentes referentes a parte da noite os presentes que você tá dormindo então assim se dorme 8 horas por dia então várias esse presente ele tem que acordar de hora em hora para dar ela esconde de todos os presentes que estão faltando que se você quiser ter e você vai ter que procurar mais tarde toda aqui dentro a todos na casa ansioso eu acho que é a única forma de surpreender mais ela hoje é como desafio no meio porque foi tanto presente que eu tô até sem criatividade já eu vou começar aqui por fora porque o primeiro lugar que vai escurecer então eu não quero pegar o dia precisa ficar mais difícil encontrar os presentes essas coisinhas aqui que são lindas mas e vai para aqui é isso eu quase confundir com flor podia camuflou né com as flores vermelhas mas achei um presente então falta mais acho que mais oito presentes ainda para encontrar ou já tem um tempinho que eu estou rodando e por enquanto eu só encontrei esse Eu ainda acho que ele colocar aí alguma coisa nada e eu não olhei na fonte ainda por isso que eu tô vendo que vai dar nada de presente aqui viu Espera eu acho encontrei mais um é um presente a o segundo presente eu acho que eu começar a procurar ali dentro que eu acho que aqui fora não vai ter mais nenhum ó vou começar pela parte de dentro e quando eu entrei na varanda já vou dar uma olhadinha aqui na varanda para ver se eu acho alguma coisa é aqui tem um presente acho que não porque daqui desde cedo então guardou e não presente aqui vou começar olhar mais preferida como tá difícil eu vou deixar aqui em cima os meus presentes que eu acho que vai ser mais ágil para poder encontrar o Hulk e aproveitando que eu tô aqui eu vou dar uma olhada no sofá cultivo só assunto falar de fora vai ter então a gente só falta de dentro tá não na última almofada encontrei que eu vou colocar aqui e vou continuar procurando olhar aqui na academia eu já dei uma olhada aqui embaixo não tem mais nada que eu não olhei nada ainda tô inventando não tá eu achei muito legal a música foi que eu olhei no nosso quarto aí então acho que ele deve ter acontecido alguma coisa por aqui também tá não daqui é presente antigo também presentinho que foram chocolate Inclusive acho que eu vou pegar um vizinho porque deu uma fome ela começou a farra a gente não a gente poder ouvir e ele escondeu um baile do sofá O que é pesada também a gente já olhei em todos os quartos e nenhum deles tinha presente eu fiquei bastante então acho que eu vou descer vou ter que trabalhar na cozinha que eu não olhei ainda mas essa planta aqui não olhei não ainda mandei você não vai ter alguma coisa aí eu acho que você não tem nada não tem sim então tá calma mais internet ai que tem que olhar totalmente tudo se eu vou dar uma olhada lá embaixo ai a cozinha Eu não olhei ainda e caramba tem muita coisa pegar na cozinha então eu vou até trabalho vou deixar você saindo aqui para ser mais ágil e bora olhar galera não não não não não entendi então coração Pelas nossas roupas são mais um presente já rodei bastante aqui embaixo e eu acho que só falta essas Aline eu não olhei ainda é que pelo a experiência que eu tive a pouco experiência eu percebi que não gosta de muito qualquer coisa no sofá a achei Oi e esse foi o último presente tinha E aí acho tudo todos os nomes que ficou um tempinho bom procurando em que eu tô inclusive bem escuro para fechar os 24 presentes até o momento a janta preparar tá no forno Oi gatinha eu preparei para você simplesmente o seu prato favorito é e a parmegiana com batata frita no meio tá uma delícia Gostou do seu dia esse vídeo deu muito trabalho mas valeu a pena valeu a pena da minha namorada feliz você tá se esse vídeo deixa muito like galera deixa muito like se você gosta de vídeos assim agradando a minha namorada não foi fácil então deixa muito me deixa muito like mesmo inscreve no canal se você no meu conhecido para você não perder nenhum vídeo pode canal da minha também tá na descrição do vídeo para vocês conferirem e Me sigam em todas as redes sociais como Instagram Tik Tok Toys a esse gente agora descansar que parece que não mas eu fiquei parado com esse vídeo até mais valeu falou pa E aí E aí
